zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强延续
zh.content:
当前雪崩币美元呈窄幅震荡偏强结构，价格运行于6.57附近并稳站20日均线上方，短期均线支撑明显，多头尝试逐步抬升低点，但上方抛压仍限制突破空间  

MACD指标维持0轴上方并呈正值扩张，短期动能仍偏多，但缺乏RSI数据确认超买或超卖状态，说明行情更多由趋势驱动而非情绪极端状态说明趋势延续但波动收敛  

下方支撑关注6.55与6.48附近20日均线位置，上方阻力集中在6.58前高区域，若放量突破则有望上探6.62一带形成扩展空间  

操作上建议以区间思路为主，未突破前高可高抛低吸，突破6.58后可顺势轻仓跟进，跌破6.55则需控制风险等待回调机会。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is trading in a mild bullish consolidation phase around 6.58, with price pressing close to the intraday high at 6.5812. The structure shows a gradual recovery after stabilizing above the 20-day SMA at 6.48139, suggesting improving medium-term footing. Volatility remains compressed, reflecting indecision, yet higher lows above 6.55 indicate buyers are still active and maintaining slight upward pressure overall in the short term.

Momentum indicators present a cautiously positive bias. The MACD reading at 0.08445 is above zero, implying bullish momentum is present, though the lack of a visible signal line limits crossover confirmation. Price holding above SMA20 reinforces trend support, while absence of RSI data prevents overbought/oversold assessment. Overall, indicators suggest strengthening accumulation rather than strong breakout momentum, favoring gradual upside continuation rather than aggressive trend expansion.

Immediate resistance is located at 6.5812, with a breakout potentially opening path toward 6.60 and 6.65 as psychological and structural extensions. On the downside, initial support sits at 6.55, aligned with the recent 24-hour low, followed by stronger support near the SMA20 at 6.48. A sustained break below this zone would weaken bullish structure and shift sentiment back toward range-bound or corrective conditions in the near term.

Trading conditions favor a range-to-breakout approach. Long positions may be considered on sustained holds above 6.55 with tight risk control below 6.48 to protect against false breakdowns. Breakout traders can watch for confirmation above 6.58–6.60 with volume expansion for continuation entries. Until clearer momentum emerges, scaling positions rather than full exposure is prudent, as price action remains constructive but not yet strongly trending.
